extortion.description: We are a multidisciplinary team with more than 30 professionals from Psychology, Psychiatry, Neuropsychology, Educational Psychology and Speech Therapy. More than 30 years of experience guarantee our services. Our services are divided into 4 main areas: ASSISTANCE AND TREATMENT: We offer a wide variety of treatments designed individually for each person, as well as advice or one-off consultations. The psychiatry and psychology teams of the Center work in a coordinated way in order to make a joint diagnostic assessment.
